---
title: "Jiho Min"
image: profile.png
include-before-body: []
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 400px
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jiho-m0521
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kr.jiho0521@gmail.com

--- 

<style>
  /* 상단 전광판 위젯을 이 페이지에서만 강제로 숨김 */
  .tradingview-widget-container {
    display: none !important;
  }
  
  /* 위젯 때문에 생겼던 상단 여백도 초기화 */
  body {
    margin-top: 0 !important;
  }
</style>
<!-- 주석 -->
### Hello! Welcome to **Jiho Min's personal website**.

This is a space where I share my thoughts, projects, and experiences related to my interests.

I am Jiho Min, a South Korean-American middle school student who is interested in coding, stock investing, and economics. I've done a few projects in Python, but I usually code for my own use. I'm also participating as a translator for various websites. I have various and diverse interests in many different fields, and I am always looking for new things to learn.

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 50px;">
  <a href="https://blog.mjiho.com" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" role="button">
    🚀 Visit My Blog!
  </a>
</div>


## 🛠 Tech Stacks

### 📱 Mobile & Game Development
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Flutter-02569B?style=for-the-badge&logo=flutter&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Dart-0175C2?style=for-the-badge&logo=dart&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Android-3DDC84?style=for-the-badge&logo=android&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Kotlin-7F52FF?style=for-the-badge&logo=kotlin&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Unity-FFFFFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=unity&logoColor=black">

### 🌐 Web & Backend
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Django-092E20?style=for-the-badge&logo=django&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Streamlit-FF4B4B?style=for-the-badge&logo=streamlit&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/HTML5-E34F26?style=for-the-badge&logo=html5&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Flet-00D2FF?style=for-the-badge&logo=flet&logoColor=white">

### 📊 Data Science & Design
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Pandas-150458?style=for-the-badge&logo=pandas&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Plotly-3F4F75?style=for-the-badge&logo=plotly&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/LaTeX-47A141?style=for-the-badge&logo=latex&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Canva-00C4CC?style=for-the-badge&logo=canva&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Matplotlib-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&logo=matplotlib&logoColor=black">

### 🚀 DevOps & Tools
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Notion-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=notion&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Netlify-00C7B7?style=for-the-badge&logo=netlify&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Quarto-75AADB?style=for-the-badge&logo=quarto&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/IFTTT-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=ifttt&logoColor=white"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Zapier-FF4F00?style=for-the-badge&logo=zapier&logoColor=white">
